label: About
title: About Storm Audio Section
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 87 recent saved-signal files and 76 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @fal: Seed Audio 1.0 is now exclusively available on fal. - An all-in-one audio model that... and Hero illustration, plus 7 more. A source image from fal.ai helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Storm Audio Section: Architectural section of a storm-lit neon audio vessel, one huge irregular cyan-gel cutaway pushed off-frame on black-green void. Pixel-stepped acid-lime rim, dense abstract perforation rows, black tunnel bites, and a thin dotted conduit create the plate grammar. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large upper cyan chamber with dotted audio-cell fan, stepped acid-lime pixel rim along left vessel mass, and storm-dark circular notch with pale crescent edge.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
